name: HTS_SCHED_EVENTS
description: Table to store schedule events during import schedule process

columns.Name: SCHED_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key column containing a random generated number.  This column is not updateable.

columns.Name: SCHED_REQUEST_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Identifier of the request as specified by the exporter

columns.Name: SCHED_EVENT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Identifier of the schedule event as specified by the exporter

columns.Name: SCHED_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: SCHED_REQUEST_ID

columns.Name: RESOURCE_REF
columns.Comments: The resource reference that matches the specified resource reference type.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_REF_TYPE
columns.Comments: Resource reference type. For now,  4 possible values: Assignment id, Assignment Number, Person Id, Person Number.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: RESOURCE_ID

columns.Name: RESOURCE_ASSIGN_ID
columns.Comments: RESOURCE_ASSIGN_ID

columns.Name: IMPORT_MODE
columns.Comments: Import mode. Values are FULL or  UPDATE.

columns.Name: PERIOD_START_DATE
columns.Comments: The period start date of the schedule that is imported

columns.Name: PERIOD_END_DATE
columns.Comments: The period end date of the schedule that is imported

columns.Name: PUBLISH
columns.Comments: Specify whether to publish the imported schedules. Values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ALLOW_EDITS
columns.Comments:
Specify whether the schedule that is imported can be edited by the scheduler in
the application, on the Manage Planned Schedule page. Values are Y or N.

columns.Name: WORKER_NOTIF
columns.Comments: Specify whether to notify workers after publishing their schedules. Values are Y or N.

columns.Name: STATUS_IMP
columns.Comments: Status for the import phase

columns.Name: STATUS_INT
columns.Comments: Status for the internalization phase

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: GROUP_ID

columns.Name: MASTER_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: MASTER_JOB_ID

columns.Name: SLAVE_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: SLAVE_JOB_ID
